verses.latin_vulgate: Væ qui condunt leges iniquas,  et scribentes injustitiam scripserunt,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ה֥וֹי הַחֹֽקְקִ֖ים חִקְקֵי־אָ֑וֶן וּֽמְכַתְּבִ֥ים עָמָ֖ל כִּתֵּֽבוּ׃
verses.king_james: Woe unto them that decree unrighteous decrees, and that write grievousness which they have prescribed;

verses.latin_vulgate: ut opprimerent in judicio pauperes,  et vim facerent causæ humilium populi mei ;  ut essent viduæ præda eorum,  et pupillos diriperent.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְהַטּ֤וֹת מִדִּין֙ דַּלִּ֔ים וְלִגְזֹ֕ל מִשְׁפַּ֖ט עֲנִיֵּ֣י עַמִּ֑י לִֽהְי֤וֹת אַלְמָנוֹת֙ שְׁלָלָ֔ם וְאֶת־יְתוֹמִ֖ים יָבֹֽזּוּ׃
verses.king_james: To turn aside the needy from judgment, and to take away the right from the poor of my people, that widows may be their prey, and that they may rob the fatherless!

verses.latin_vulgate: Quid facietis in die visitationis,  et calamitatis de longe venientis ?  ad cujus confugietis auxilium ?  et ubi derelinquetis gloriam vestram,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמַֽה־תַּעֲשׂוּ֙ לְי֣וֹם פְּקֻדָּ֔ה וּלְשׁוֹאָ֖ה מִמֶּרְחָ֣ק תָּב֑וֹא עַל־מִי֙ תָּנ֣וּסוּ לְעֶזְרָ֔ה וְאָ֥נָה תַעַזְב֖וּ כְּבוֹדְכֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: And what will ye do in the day of visitation, and in the desolation which shall come from far? to whom will ye flee for help? and where will ye leave your glory?

verses.latin_vulgate: ne incurvemini sub vinculo,  et cum interfectis cadatis ?  Super omnibus his non est aversus furor ejus,  sed adhuc manus ejus extenta.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בִּלְתִּ֤י כָרַע֙ תַּ֣חַת אַסִּ֔יר וְתַ֥חַת הֲרוּגִ֖ים יִפֹּ֑לוּ בְּכׇל־זֹאת֙ לֹא־שָׁ֣ב אַפּ֔וֹ וְע֖וֹד יָד֥וֹ נְטוּיָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Without me they shall bow down under the prisoners, and they shall fall under the slain. For all this his anger is not turned away, but his hand is stretched out still.

verses.latin_vulgate: Væ Assur ! virga furoris mei et baculus ipse est ;  in manu eorum indignatio mea.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ה֥וֹי אַשּׁ֖וּר שֵׁ֣בֶט אַפִּ֑י וּמַטֶּה־ה֥וּא בְיָדָ֖ם זַעְמִֽי׃
verses.king_james: O Assyrian, the rod of mine anger, and the staff in their hand is mine indignation.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ad gentem fallacem mittam eum,  et contra populum furoris mei mandabo illi,  ut auferat spolia, et diripiat prædam,  et ponat illum in conculcationem quasi lutum platearum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּג֤וֹי חָנֵף֙ אֲשַׁלְּחֶ֔נּוּ וְעַל־עַ֥ם עֶבְרָתִ֖י אֲצַוֶּ֑נּוּ לִשְׁלֹ֤ל שָׁלָל֙ וְלָבֹ֣ז בַּ֔ז (ולשימו) [וּלְשׂוּמ֥וֹ] מִרְמָ֖ס כְּחֹ֥מֶר חוּצֽוֹת׃
verses.king_james: I will send him against an hypocritical nation, and against the people of my wrath will I give him a charge, to take the spoil, and to take the prey, and to tread them down like the mire of the streets.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ipse autem non sic arbitrabitur,  et cor ejus non ita existimabit ;  sed ad conterendum erit cor ejus,  et ad internecionem gentium non paucarum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהוּא֙ לֹא־כֵ֣ן יְדַמֶּ֔ה וּלְבָב֖וֹ לֹא־כֵ֣ן יַחְשֹׁ֑ב כִּ֚י לְהַשְׁמִ֣יד בִּלְבָב֔וֹ וּלְהַכְרִ֥ית גּוֹיִ֖ם לֹ֥א מְעָֽט׃
verses.king_james: Howbeit he meaneth not so, neither doth his heart think so; but it is in his heart to destroy and cut off nations not a few.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dicet enim :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֖י יֹאמַ֑ר הֲלֹ֥א שָׂרַ֛י יַחְדָּ֖ו מְלָכִֽים׃
verses.king_james: For he saith, Are not my princes altogether kings?

verses.latin_vulgate: Numquid non principes mei simul reges sunt ?  numquid non ut Charcamis, sic Calano ?  et ut Arphad, sic Emath ?  numquid non ut Damascus, sic Samaria ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֲלֹ֥א כְּכַרְכְּמִ֖ישׁ כַּלְנ֑וֹ אִם־לֹ֤א כְאַרְפַּד֙ חֲמָ֔ת אִם־לֹ֥א כְדַמֶּ֖שֶׂק שֹׁמְרֽוֹן׃
verses.king_james: Is not Calno as Carchemish? is not Hamath as Arpad? is not Samaria as Damascus?

verses.latin_vulgate: Quomodo invenit manus mea regna idoli,  sic et simulacra eorum de Jerusalem et de Samaria.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כַּֽאֲשֶׁר֙ מָצְאָ֣ה יָדִ֔י לְמַמְלְכֹ֖ת הָאֱלִ֑יל וּפְסִ֣ילֵיהֶ֔ם מִירוּשָׁלַ֖͏ִם וּמִשֹּׁמְרֽוֹן׃
verses.king_james: As my hand hath found the kingdoms of the idols, and whose graven images did excel them of Jerusalem and of Samaria;

verses.latin_vulgate: Numquid non sicut feci Samariæ et idolis ejus,  sic faciam Jerusalem et simulacris ejus ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֲלֹ֗א כַּאֲשֶׁ֥ר עָשִׂ֛יתִי לְשֹׁמְר֖וֹן וְלֶאֱלִילֶ֑יהָ כֵּ֛ן אֶעֱשֶׂ֥ה לִירוּשָׁלַ֖͏ִם וְלַעֲצַבֶּֽיהָ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Shall I not, as I have done unto Samaria and her idols, so do to Jerusalem and her idols?

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit, cum impleverit Dominus  cuncta opera sua  in monte Sion et in Jerusalem,  visitabo super fructum magnifici cordis regis Assur,  et super gloriam altitudinis oculorum ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֗ה כִּֽי־יְבַצַּ֤ע אֲדֹנָי֙ אֶת־כׇּל־מַֽעֲשֵׂ֔הוּ בְּהַ֥ר צִיּ֖וֹן וּבִירוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם אֶפְקֹ֗ד עַל־פְּרִֽי־גֹ֙דֶל֙ לְבַ֣ב מֶלֶךְ־אַשּׁ֔וּר וְעַל־תִּפְאֶ֖רֶת ר֥וּם עֵינָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: Wherefore it shall come to pass, that when the Lord hath performed his whole work upon mount Zion and on Jerusalem, I will punish the fruit of the stout heart of the king of Assyria, and the glory of his high looks.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dixit enim : In fortitudine manus meæ feci,  et in sapientia mea intellexi ;  et abstuli terminos populorum,  et principes eorum deprædatus sum,  et detraxi quasi potens in sublimi residentes.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י אָמַ֗ר בְּכֹ֤חַ יָדִי֙ עָשִׂ֔יתִי וּבְחׇכְמָתִ֖י כִּ֣י נְבֻנ֑וֹתִי וְאָסִ֣יר ׀ גְּבוּלֹ֣ת עַמִּ֗ים (ועתידתיהם) [וַעֲתֽוּדֹתֵיהֶם֙] שׁוֹשֵׂ֔תִי וְאוֹרִ֥יד כַּאבִּ֖יר יוֹשְׁבִֽים׃
verses.king_james: For he saith, By the strength of my hand I have done it, and by my wisdom; for I am prudent: and I have removed the bounds of the people, and have robbed their treasures, and I have put down the inhabitants like a valiant man:

verses.latin_vulgate: Et invenit quasi nidum manus mea  fortitudinem populorum ;  et sicut colliguntur ova quæ derelicta sunt,  sic universam terram ego congregavi ;  et non fuit qui moveret pennam,  et aperiret os, et ganniret.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַתִּמְצָ֨א כַקֵּ֤ן ׀ יָדִי֙ לְחֵ֣יל הָעַמִּ֔ים וְכֶֽאֱסֹף֙ בֵּיצִ֣ים עֲזֻב֔וֹת כׇּל־הָאָ֖רֶץ אֲנִ֣י אָסָ֑פְתִּי וְלֹ֤א הָיָה֙ נֹדֵ֣ד כָּנָ֔ף וּפֹצֶ֥ה פֶ֖ה וּמְצַפְצֵֽף׃
verses.king_james: And my hand hath found as a nest the riches of the people: and as one gathereth eggs that are left, have I gathered all the earth; and there was none that moved the wing, or opened the mouth, or peeped.

verses.latin_vulgate: Numquid gloriabitur securis contra eum qui secat in ea ?  aut exaltabitur serra contra eum a quo trahitur ?  Quomodo si elevetur virga contra elevantem se,  et exaltetur baculus, qui utique lignum est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֲיִתְפָּאֵר֙ הַגַּרְזֶ֔ן עַ֖ל הַחֹצֵ֣ב בּ֑וֹ אִם־יִתְגַּדֵּ֤ל הַמַּשּׂוֹר֙ עַל־מְנִיפ֔וֹ כְּהָנִ֥יף שֵׁ֙בֶט֙ וְאֶת־מְרִימָ֔יו כְּהָרִ֥ים מַטֶּ֖ה לֹא־עֵֽץ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Shall the axe boast itself against him that heweth therewith? or shall the saw magnify itself against him that shaketh it? as if the rod should shake itself against them that lift it up, or as if the staff should lift up itself, as if it were no wood.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propter hoc mittet Dominator, Dominus exercituum,  in pinguibus ejus tenuitatem ;  et subtus gloriam ejus succensa ardebit  quasi combustio ignis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָ֠כֵן יְשַׁלַּ֨ח הָאָד֜וֹן יְהֹוָ֧ה צְבָא֛וֹת בְּמִשְׁמַנָּ֖יו רָז֑וֹן וְתַ֧חַת כְּבֹד֛וֹ יֵקַ֥ד יְקֹ֖ד כִּיק֥וֹד אֵֽשׁ׃
verses.king_james: Therefore shall the Lord, the Lord of hosts, send among his fat ones leanness; and under his glory he shall kindle a burning like the burning of a fire.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit lumen Israël in igne,  et Sanctus ejus in flamma ;  et succendetur, et devorabitur  spina ejus et vepres in die una.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֤ה אֽוֹר־יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ לְאֵ֔שׁ וּקְדוֹשׁ֖וֹ לְלֶהָבָ֑ה וּבָעֲרָ֗ה וְאָכְלָ֛ה שִׁית֥וֹ וּשְׁמִיר֖וֹ בְּי֥וֹם אֶחָֽד׃
verses.king_james: And the light of Israel shall be for a fire, and his Holy One for a flame: and it shall burn and devour his thorns and his briers in one day;

verses.latin_vulgate: Et gloria saltus ejus, et carmeli ejus,  ab anima usque ad carnem consumetur ;  et erit terrore profugus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּכְב֤וֹד יַעְרוֹ֙ וְכַרְמִלּ֔וֹ מִנֶּ֥פֶשׁ וְעַד־בָּשָׂ֖ר יְכַלֶּ֑ה וְהָיָ֖ה כִּמְסֹ֥ס נֹסֵֽס׃
verses.king_james: And shall consume the glory of his forest, and of his fruitful field, both soul and body: and they shall be as when a standardbearer fainteth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et reliquiæ ligni saltus ejus præ paucitate numerabuntur,  et puer scribet eos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּשְׁאָ֥ר עֵ֛ץ יַעְר֖וֹ מִסְפָּ֣ר יִהְי֑וּ וְנַ֖עַר יִכְתְּבֵֽם׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And the rest of the trees of his forest shall be few, that a child may write them.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit in die illa :  non adjiciet residuum Israël,  et hi qui fugerint de domo Jacob,  inniti super eo qui percutit eos ;  sed innitetur super Dominum,  Sanctum Israël, in veritate.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֣ה ׀ בַּיּ֣וֹם הַה֗וּא לֹא־יוֹסִ֨יף ע֜וֹד שְׁאָ֤ר יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ וּפְלֵיטַ֣ת בֵּֽית־יַעֲקֹ֔ב לְהִשָּׁעֵ֖ן עַל־מַכֵּ֑הוּ וְנִשְׁעַ֗ן עַל־יְהֹוָ֛ה קְד֥וֹשׁ יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל בֶּאֱמֶֽת׃
verses.king_james: And it shall come to pass in that day, that the remnant of Israel, and such as are escaped of the house of Jacob, shall no more again stay upon him that smote them; but shall stay upon the Lord, the Holy One of Israel, in truth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Reliquiæ convertentur ; reliquiæ, inquam, Jacob  ad Deum fortem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שְׁאָ֥ר יָשׁ֖וּב שְׁאָ֣ר יַעֲקֹ֑ב אֶל־אֵ֖ל גִּבּֽוֹר׃
verses.king_james: The remnant shall return, even the remnant of Jacob, unto the mighty God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Si enim fuerit populus tuus, Israël, quasi arena maris,  reliquiæ convertentur ex eo ;  consummatio abbreviata  inundabit justitiam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י אִם־יִהְיֶ֞ה עַמְּךָ֤ יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ כְּח֣וֹל הַיָּ֔ם שְׁאָ֖ר יָשׁ֣וּב בּ֑וֹ כִּלָּי֥וֹן חָר֖וּץ שׁוֹטֵ֥ף צְדָקָֽה׃
verses.king_james: For though thy people Israel be as the sand of the sea, yet a remnant of them shall return: the consumption decreed shall overflow with righteousness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Consummationem enim et abbreviationem  Dominus Deus exercituum faciet in medio omnis terræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֥י כָלָ֖ה וְנֶחֱרָצָ֑ה אֲדֹנָ֤י יֱהֹוִה֙ צְבָא֔וֹת עֹשֶׂ֖ה בְּקֶ֥רֶב כׇּל־הָאָֽרֶץ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: For the Lord God of hosts shall make a consumption, even determined, in the midst of all the land.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propter hoc, hæc dicit Dominus Deus exercituum :  Noli timere, populus meus,  habitator Sion, ab Assur :  in virga percutiet te,  et baculum suum levabit super te,  in via Ægypti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לָכֵ֗ן כֹּֽה־אָמַ֞ר אֲדֹנָ֤י יֱהֹוִה֙ צְבָא֔וֹת אַל־תִּירָ֥א עַמִּ֛י יֹשֵׁ֥ב צִיּ֖וֹן מֵאַשּׁ֑וּר בַּשֵּׁ֣בֶט יַכֶּ֔כָּה וּמַטֵּ֥הוּ יִשָּֽׂא־עָלֶ֖יךָ בְּדֶ֥רֶךְ מִצְרָֽיִם׃
verses.king_james: Therefore thus saith the Lord God of hosts, O my people that dwellest in Zion, be not afraid of the Assyrian: he shall smite thee with a rod, and shall lift up his staff against thee, after the manner of Egypt.

verses.latin_vulgate: Adhuc enim paululum modicumque,  et consummabitur indignatio  et furor meus super scelus eorum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּי־ע֖וֹד מְעַ֣ט מִזְעָ֑ר וְכָ֣לָה זַ֔עַם וְאַפִּ֖י עַל־תַּבְלִיתָֽם׃
verses.king_james: For yet a very little while, and the indignation shall cease, and mine anger in their destruction.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et suscitabit super eum Dominus exercituum flagellum,  juxta plagam Madian in petra Oreb :  et virgam suam super mare,  et levabit eam in via Ægypti.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעוֹרֵ֨ר עָלָ֜יו יְהֹוָ֤ה צְבָאוֹת֙ שׁ֔וֹט כְּמַכַּ֥ת מִדְיָ֖ן בְּצ֣וּר עוֹרֵ֑ב וּמַטֵּ֙הוּ֙ עַל־הַיָּ֔ם וּנְשָׂא֖וֹ בְּדֶ֥רֶךְ מִצְרָֽיִם׃
verses.king_james: And the Lord of hosts shall stir up a scourge for him according to the slaughter of Midian at the rock of Oreb: and as his rod was upon the sea, so shall he lift it up after the manner of Egypt.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit in die illa :  auferetur onus ejus de humero tuo  et jugum ejus de collo tuo,  et computrescet jugum a facie olei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֣ה ׀ בַּיּ֣וֹם הַה֗וּא יָס֤וּר סֻבֳּלוֹ֙ מֵעַ֣ל שִׁכְמֶ֔ךָ וְעֻלּ֖וֹ מֵעַ֣ל צַוָּארֶ֑ךָ וְחֻבַּ֥ל עֹ֖ל מִפְּנֵי־שָֽׁמֶן׃
verses.king_james: And it shall come to pass in that day, that his burden shall be taken away from off thy shoulder, and his yoke from off thy neck, and the yoke shall be destroyed because of the anointing.

verses.latin_vulgate: Veniet in Ajath, transibit in Magron,  apud Machmas commendabit vasa sua.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בָּ֥א עַל־עַיַּ֖ת עָבַ֣ר בְּמִגְר֑וֹן לְמִכְמָ֖שׂ יַפְקִ֥יד כֵּלָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: He is come to Aiath, he is passed to Migron; at Michmash he hath laid up his carriages:

verses.latin_vulgate: Transierunt cursim,  Gaba sedes nostra ;  obstupuit Rama,  Gabaath Saulis fugit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עָֽבְרוּ֙ מַעְבָּרָ֔ה גֶּ֖בַע מָל֣וֹן לָ֑נוּ חָֽרְדָה֙ הָרָמָ֔ה גִּבְעַ֥ת שָׁא֖וּל נָֽסָה׃
verses.king_james: They are gone over the passage: they have taken up their lodging at Geba; Ramah is afraid; Gibeah of Saul is fled.

verses.latin_vulgate: Hinni voce tua, filia Gallim,  attende Laisa, paupercula Anathoth.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: צַהֲלִ֥י קוֹלֵ֖ךְ בַּת־גַּלִּ֑ים הַקְשִׁ֥יבִי לַ֖יְשָׁה עֲנִיָּ֥ה עֲנָתֽוֹת׃
verses.king_james: Lift up thy voice, O daughter of Gallim: cause it to be heard unto Laish, O poor Anathoth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Migravit Medemena ;  habitatores Gabim, confortamini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: נָֽדְדָ֖ה מַדְמֵנָ֑ה יֹשְׁבֵ֥י הַגֵּבִ֖ים הֵעִֽיזוּ׃
verses.king_james: Madmenah is removed; the inhabitants of Gebim gather themselves to flee.

verses.latin_vulgate: Adhuc dies est ut in Nobe stetur ;  agitabit manum suam super montem filiæ Sion,  collem Jerusalem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ע֥וֹד הַיּ֖וֹם בְּנֹ֣ב לַעֲמֹ֑ד יְנֹפֵ֤ף יָדוֹ֙ הַ֣ר (בית) [בַּת־]צִיּ֔וֹן גִּבְעַ֖ת יְרוּשָׁלָֽ͏ִם׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: As yet shall he remain at Nob that day: he shall shake his hand against the mount of the daughter of Zion, the hill of Jerusalem.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce Dominator, Dominus exercituum,  confringet lagunculam in terrore ;  et excelsi statura succidentur,  et sublimes humiliabuntur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנֵּ֤ה הָאָדוֹן֙ יְהֹוָ֣ה צְבָא֔וֹת מְסָעֵ֥ף פֻּארָ֖ה בְּמַעֲרָצָ֑ה וְרָמֵ֤י הַקּוֹמָה֙ גְּדוּעִ֔ים וְהַגְּבֹהִ֖ים יִשְׁפָּֽלוּ׃
verses.king_james: Behold, the Lord, the Lord of hosts, shall lop the bough with terror: and the high ones of stature shall be hewn down, and the haughty shall be humbled.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et subvertentur condensa saltus ferro ;  et Libanus cum excelsis cadet.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְנִקַּ֛ף סִֽבְכֵ֥י הַיַּ֖עַר בַּבַּרְזֶ֑ל וְהַלְּבָנ֖וֹן בְּאַדִּ֥יר יִפּֽוֹל׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And he shall cut down the thickets of the forest with iron, and Lebanon shall fall by a mighty one.
